title: Distant Heaven Pill
content:
The 
Distant Heaven Pill
 (远天丹) is a rare and potent alchemical elixir in 
Xian Ni
, renowned for its ability to accelerate and stabilize crucial cultivation breakthroughs. Crafted only by the most skilled pill masters, it combines legendary herbs and celestial energies to refine a cultivator’s Essence, smoothing the transition from Foundation Establishment to Core Formation. When consumed, the pill sharpens Qi condensation and fortifies the body and spirit against the brutal backlash of heavenly tribulations, making it an invaluable aid for those standing on the edge of profound transformation. Wang Lin relies on the Distant Heaven Pill during his early Core Formation breakthrough, where even an incomplete version provides a vital boost, allowing him to shatter longstanding bottlenecks. Its power extends beyond mere cultivation speed—this pill represents the pinnacle of alchemical craftsmanship, symbolizing the fusion of Dao mastery and spiritual refinement.
